sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69271" key="murioge/nesis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῡρῐο-γένεσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n69271.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the signs which rise with Pisces</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Firm.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1.2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.1.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
